channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Savannah Guthrie Returns to “Today” Show Studio for First Time Since Mom Nancy’s Disappearance 33 Days Ago
item.description: Nancy Guthrie was reported missing on Feb. 1 when she failed to attend a virtual church service

item.title: Patrick Stewart Performs Shakespeare’s Complete Sonnets in New Audiobook (Exclusive)
item.description: "I hope these recordings create moments for listeners to recognize themselves in his words," says the acclaimed actor and narrator of the project

item.title: All About Tom Hanks' 4 Children, Colin, Elizabeth, Chet and Truman
item.description: Tom Hanks is a dad to one daughter and three sons

item.title: Valerie Bertinelli on Breakups and Dating at 65 : ‘I Love Men but I Don’t Want Them to Make Me Crazy' (Exclusive)
item.description: The star, 65, opened up about being single and open to love again in an interview with PEOPLE for this week's cover

item.title: Holly Madison Doesn’t Want to Introduce Her 2 Kids to Her Next Partner Until She’s 'Engaged' (Exclusive)
item.description: The former 'Playboy' model says she doesn't "want to bring a rotating cast of people in and out of my kids' lives at all"

item.title: Savannah Guthrie Visits 'Today' Show Studio Amid Nancy's Kidnapping Case
item.description: Savannah Guthrie hasreturned to the 'TODAY' show studio for the first time since her mom Nancy Guthrie was kidnapped from her bed in the middle of the...

item.title: Zendaya All Smiles in New Pic Amid Claim She's Married to Tom Holland
item.description: Zendaya is seemingly having the time of her life amid a claim by her stylist she and Tom Holland secretly got hitched. Check out this photo of the act...

item.title: White House Uses ‘Call of Duty’ Footage Promoting Iran Strikes, in Video
item.description: The White House is flexing its muscles in the escalating conflict with Iran ... sharing a highlight video of U.S. strikes that bizarrely opens with fo...

item.title: Bhad Bhabie Steps Out on SKIMS Shopping Trip With Boyfriend Le Vaughn
item.description: It looks like Bhad Bhabie and Le Vaughn are still going strong ... and shopping 'til they drop at Kim Kardashian's SKIMS store in Los Angeles! Check o...

item.title: Britney Spears Arrested in California for DUI
item.description: Britney Spears was arrested in Ventura County, California Wednesday night for a DUI, law enforcement sources tell TMZ. The pop superstar was handcuffe...
